info.name: RHWP Studio
info.summary: Open HWP/HWPX files in RHWP Studio via rhwp WebAssembly.
info.description: Open Hangul Word Processor files (.hwp / .hwpx) directly in Nextcloud Files using RHWP Studio and the rhwp WebAssembly engine. No external services. Server-side SVG previews via the bundled `rhwp` CLI.
info.author: mulatta
